title: Heptapleurum fantsipanense
taxonomy: Heptapleurum fantsipanense is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant is native to Vietnam. It is a climbing vine that grows in tropical regions. The classification of Heptapleurum fantsipanense is part of the larger classification system for the plant kingdom, which includes its kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, and species levels. intro: Heptapleurum fantsipanense, also known as the Fantsipan umbrella tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. Research has shown that the plant has various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against chronic diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease.
